relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file represents a lending decision override notification from risk_and_compliance to credit (a decision flowing into the credit system), while the outbound file represents loan applications flowing from credit to risk_and_compliance (applications flowing out for review). These are opposite directions in the workflow with fundamentally different purposes: one is a compliance override decision, the other is a loan application submission. The inbound file contains override approval details and compliance flags, while the outbound file requires applicant personal information (full_name, date_of_birth, email, phone, employment details) that are entirely absent from the inbound schema. The data structures, message types, and information flows are incompatible.
